name: temporal-ordering
description: Tests time-dependent relevance. Memories have timestamps, and recall must prefer recent information for time-sensitive queries. Tests decay algorithms and temporal ranking.

examples.query: What is the current deployment process?
expectedMemories: GitHub Actions with auto-deploy on main merge (2026-06-01)
Docker build and push to ECR (2026-05-15)

examples.query: Which rate limiting approach is active?
What changed in the caching layer recently?
expectedMemories: Cache warming added for critical queries (2026-06-10)
TTL increased from 5min to 15min for user data (2026-06-05)

examples.query: Who is the current team lead?
expectedMemories: Alice Chen is the team lead (since 2026-04-01)
Bob Smith was team lead (2025-01-01 to 2026-03-31)

examples.query: What API version is currently active?
What is the current Node.js version requirement?
